data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a full audit trail for permission changes, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete data or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case outlines the need for an audit trail, there is no evidence in the prior steps that confirms its implementation or existence. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage as no relevant evidence was found to support the claim of having a full audit trail.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of a full audit trail for permission changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add audit trail verification endpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of the audit trail for permission changes.
